copy.invocationLine: Shubha Vivaha · Inviting you to a sacred union
copy.invocationBlessing: Shri Lakshmi Narasimhaya Namaha — with the blessings of our family deity and our elders, we begin.
copy.parentsLine: Ashwin, son of Jayanthi & Raghavendran, weds Akshata, daughter of Shilpa & Srikanth
copy.muhurthamBlessing: May this union, kindled before the sacred fire, be blessed with a lifetime of love, prosperity, and joy.
copy.rsvpIntro: Tell us which moments you will share with us, so we can plan seating and travel beautifully.
copy.unlockNote: You traced the wedding kolam. The hidden gallery is open, and the code GOLDENGARLAND is saved on your RSVP.
copy.streamNote: The livestream will appear here just before the muhurtham begins.

events.title: Wedding & Muhurtham
events.note: The wedding morning begins at 9:30 AM, with the sacred muhurtham at 11:15 AM. Lunch will be served after the muhurtham.
events.ritual: South Indian traditional looks are a lovely fit for the morning, but please treat this as a suggestion. Come comfortable, joyful, and ready to celebrate.

events.title: High Tea & Games
events.note: A relaxed garden afternoon with tea, chai, light bites, games, and conversation
events.ritual: Garden-party dresses, suits, and cheerful colors will feel right at home. The recommendation is optional; the main assignment is having a wonderful afternoon.

events.title: Reception & Sangeet
events.note: Dinner, music, performances, and dancing under the lights
events.ritual: Festive Indian outfits, western formalwear, evening dresses, suits, and western wear are all welcome. Dress up if you feel like it; dance either way.

travel.title: Airport
travel.body: Seattle-Tacoma International Airport is the easiest arrival point. Plan extra buffer for Sunday traffic toward Redmond.

travel.title: Stay
travel.body: A limited set of rooms will be reserved for guests and offered on a first-RSVP basis. Please note whether you would like a room for Saturday, August 15 night or Sunday, August 16 night in the RSVP so we can plan the room blocks.

travel.title: Rental Cars
travel.body: Rental cars are available at Seattle-Tacoma International Airport and are the most flexible option for getting to Redmond and around the area. Uber and Lyft also work well locally.

faq.question: When should we arrive if we want zero drama?
faq.answer: For the wedding morning, arriving by 9:30 AM is perfect. The muhurtham is at 11:15 AM, and we would love everyone settled before the sacred moment begins.

faq.question: Do we have to follow the outfit suggestions?
faq.answer: Nope. The attire notes are friendly suggestions, not homework. Wear what lets you feel comfortable, festive, and ready for photos, hugs, food, and dancing.

faq.question: Will there be food, or should we pack emergency snacks?
faq.answer: You will be fed. There will be wedding lunch, high tea, dinner, and enough celebration energy to make snack planning feel overly serious.

faq.question: What is the easiest way to get around?
faq.answer: Rental cars are available at Seattle-Tacoma International Airport and are the most flexible option for Redmond. Uber and Lyft work locally too.

faq.question: Can we take photos?
faq.answer: Yes, absolutely. During the muhurtham, please give the priest, mandapam, and photographer clear sight lines. Everywhere else, capture the joy.
